description: Implement an automated self-healing mechanism in NextGen Connect. Create a target channel named 'Unstable_Service' (TCP Listener on port 7000) and a watchdog channel named 'System_Watchdog' (JavaScript Reader source, 10-second interval). The watchdog must use the ChannelUtil API to monitor 'Unstable_Service' and, if it is not in a STARTED state, programmatically restart the channel and append a timestamped log entry with the message 'Restarted Unstable_Service' to /home/ga/watchdog.log.
